name: M8A1
note: BO7-native Burst-DMR (5.56 NATO, 591 RPM, 32-round; Named-Exotic 'Flashburst'/Frost Rounds in Endgame). BO7-Naming. reload roh 2.88. Universelle Slots = BO7-Pool.

21" Frontline Barrel :: +8.9% Range | +8% Bullet Velocity | +3.8% ADS Time
15" Ascend-KS Barrel :: -7.5% ADS Time | -7.5% Sprint to Fire
16.5" Deadeye Barrel :: -15% Gun Kick | -15% Horiz. Recoil | -15% Vert. Recoil | -15.7% Idle Sway | -20% Flinch | -6.9% ADS Move | +10.6% ADS Time | +8% Sprint to Fire
FIRE MODS: Bolt Carrier Group :: -20% Range | -15% Bullet Velocity | +5.8% Fire Rate | +35% Gun Kick | +35% Horiz. Recoil | +35% Vert. Recoil
Buffer Spring :: -8% Gun Kick | -8% Horiz. Recoil | -8% Vert. Recoil
MAGAZINE: Redline Capacity Drum :: -4.4% Move | -4.3% Crouch | -4.2% Sprint | -10.3% ADS Move | +7.5% ADS Time | +13.5% Reload
Blink-Chamber Fast Clip :: -3.8% ADS Time | -35.6% Reload | -5% Sprint to Fire

RL-5.56 Brake :: -6.3% Gun Kick | -8% Vert. Recoil
Monolithic Suppressor :: +6.7% Range | +20% Bullet Velocity | +20.8% ADS Time
